title: Neurocalyx calycinus
taxonomy: Neurocalyx calycinus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Australia and is a member of the Rubiaceae family, which includes other plants such as coffee and gardenias. The classification of Neurocalyx calycinus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Rubiales, and family Rubiaceae. The genus Neurocalyx is a small group of plants that are endemic to Australia. Neurocalyx calycinus is an important part of the Australian flora and is studied by botanists and horticulturists for its unique characteristics.
